channel.title: 5 Requests Per Second
channel.description: Official bilingual website for the animated feature film 5 Requests Per Second / 秒速5リクエスト.

item.title: 5RPS Full Movie Screenplay Completed: The Human Thinks, the Agents Execute
item.description: We successfully completed the full-length screenplay after a manual first pass, an unsuccessful agent-driven rewrite, and a second human-led draft supported by production agents.
item.author: contact@akiyamasho.com (秋山翔・kino.io)

item.title: Trailer Release
item.description: The trailer is now live on all platforms.
item.author: contact@akiyamasho.com (秋山翔・kino.io)

item.title: First Clip and X/LinkedIn
item.description: The first teaser clip is live, and our X and LinkedIn pages are now open.
item.author: contact@akiyamasho.com (秋山翔・kino.io)

item.title: Instagram Launch
item.description: The 5 Requests Per Second Instagram page is now live.
item.author: contact@akiyamasho.com (秋山翔・kino.io)
